name: Faust sneaked into your bed
description:
"Why must you disturb Faust’s sleep? Faust detects no emergency." - paust.

Another Limbus Company bot. Now with Faust. Thought the image was cute (exclude the badonkers on it) and decided to make this bot. As always, token heavy because i like to include other sinners as side characters (bare minimum personalities and descriptions) and information about the City in general so a Proxy is probably required to run this properly. But most importantly....

HAVE FUN🩷!

UPDATE: Just posted it and found out another fellow bot creator already made a similar scenario... Bruh... But i guess it is what it is... Check him out i guess since he was faster with this image - @Buttadawggg
